overview: A web app for uploading Fountain-formatted screenplays and running a table read with distinct voices per character using the browser's speech synthesis, with auto-scrolling, sticky playback controls, and a creative voice configuration studio.
features: Table read playback with Web Speech API
Per-character voice assignment with pitch and rate controls
Creative Voice Studio tab with color-coded character cards
Smart skip-back: jumps to previous block if less than 2 seconds in
Auto-scroll keeps current spoken line visible
Speech preprocessing: omits ellipses and dashes, reads INT/EXT as inside/outside
